headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Chubb, Raises Price Target to $374
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst David Motemaden   maintains Chubb (NYSE:CB) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $349 to $374.

headline: Citizens Maintains Market Outperform on Chubb, Raises Price Target to $400
summary: Citizens  analyst Matthew J. Carletti   maintains Chubb (NYSE:CB) with a Market Outperform and raises the price target from $365 to $400.
